task_completion.description: Open the target discharge summary document
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the 'discharge_summary_raw.odt' document.
The text 'HOSPITAL DISCHARGE SUMMARY' at the top of the document is visually formatted as a title (e.g., centered, bolded, or larger font size).
A table structure is visible in the document containing the patient's name ('Robert Evans') and MRN ('8849201').

The five section headings ('ADMISSION DIAGNOSES', 'DISCHARGE DIAGNOSES', 'HOSPITAL COURSE', 'DISCHARGE MEDICATIONS', 'DISCHARGE INSTRUCTIONS') are visually formatted as distinct headings (e.g., bold, larger font, or using specific heading styles).

task_completion.description: Create a bulleted list for medications
task_completion.visual_evidence: The medications ('Furosemide', 'Lisinopril', 'Metformin') are formatted as a proper bulleted list using the word processor's list feature.
The sentence 'Return to emergency room if experiencing severe shortness of breath' is visually emphasized (e.g., bold, italicized, underlined, highlighted, or colored text).

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI word processor to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI application like LibreOffice Writer, rather than using terminal commands or a plain text editor to insert raw ODT markup.

integrity.description: Agent used actual formatting tools rather than plain text approximations
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the application's table insertion tool and bullet list buttons, rather than just typing asterisks for bullets or spaces/tabs to simulate a table.

integrity.description: Agent saved the changes to the original file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Save' or uses the 'Save As' dialog to overwrite '/home/ga/Documents/discharge_summary_raw.odt', and the window title does not show an 'unsaved' indicator at the end of the task.
